failure_modes.text: Teams talk about selection and emergence without defining the fitness criteria the human system should actually optimize.
failure_modes.source_quote: failure to define what fitness actually means
failure_modes.mitigation: Define the fitness function explicitly before invoking selection language: state what is being optimized, by what mechanism, and over what time horizon.

failure_modes.text: A bad analogy imports biological logic into a business context that does not share the same structural mechanism.
failure_modes.source_quote: superficial similarities instead of the correct structural relationship
failure_modes.mitigation: Test structural homology before importing the analogy: list at least three mechanisms the biological and business contexts share and one they do not, then judge whether the analogy still holds.

failure_modes.text: Survival bias makes people study only the winners and miss what the eliminated variants would have taught them.
failure_modes.mitigation: Deliberately study the eliminated variants: run a post-mortem on failed experiments or abandoned options to extract learning that survivor-only analysis would miss.

premortem_questions.text: What evidence would show this situation does not actually fit the selection process we are borrowing from biology?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Does this situation fit the reference class

premortem_questions.text: Which part of the current design needs more variation before we can trust the environment to select among options?
If this solution wins, will it be because we improved the machine or just masked a symptom temporarily?
premortem_questions.source_quote: fix a fundamental flaw in our design

heuristics.text: Do it like Darwin by generating more credible variants before narrowing too early.
Use iterative refinement and feedback loops so retention follows evidence instead of taste.
heuristics.source_quote: gradually adjusting it based on the responses

heuristics.text: Treat quantity in ideation as a path to better quality when the environment is still selecting.

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
